title: A modular greenhouse with method
abstract: The invention could be a prefabricated modular greenhouse comprising a plurality of sections, each section constructed from a framework further creating an open space that is enclosed by a cover attached to the framework; a first group of sections from the plurality of sections forming a plurality of foldable panels, two or more foldable panels being connected together in a manner to allow the one foldable panel to fold upon the second foldable panel for a compact state; a second group of sections from the plurality of sections are connected together to form at least one non- foldable panel; and the connected non-foldable panels and the at least one foldable panel being removably connected to form an assembled modular greenhouse that allows additional non- foldable panels non-foldable panels or both to be added to assembled modular greenhouse to subsequently change one or more architectural details of the assembled modular greenhouse.
claims:
Claims CLAIMS What is claimed is: 1. A modular greenhouse that is prefabricated at a first site remote from a second site where the modular greenhouse is subsequently assembled, comprising: (A) a plurality of sections, each section constructed from a framework, the framework further creating an open space within the framework, the open space being covered by a cover attached to the framework; (B) a first group of sections from the plurality of sections forming a plurality of foldable panels, one foldable panel from the plurality being movably connected to a second foldable panel from the plurality to form one foldable panel pair that allows the one foldable panel to fold down upon the second foldable panel in a collapsed storage state; (C) a second group of sections from the plurality of sections that are connected together to form at least one non- foldable panel; and (D) the non- foldable panel pair and the at least one foldable panel being removably connected to form an assembled modular greenhouse and to allow additional non- foldable panels, additional non-foldable panels or both to be added to the assembled modular greenhouse to subsequently change one or more architectural details of the assembled modular greenhouse. 2. The modular greenhouse of claim 1 , wherein the one foldable panel pair is connected to a second foldable panel pair by a hinge to form the foldable panel combination. 3. The modular greenhouse of claim 2, wherein the hinge is separated into two hinge ends, one 

 hinge end on the one foldable panel and another hinge end on the second foldable panel to allow one foldable panel to be disconnected from the second foldable panel to be removably connected to a third foldable panel. 4. The modular greenhouse of claim 2, wherein the one foldable panel is a wall panel and the second foldable panel is a roof panel. 5. The modular greenhouse of claim 2, wherein the foldable panel combination allows the foldable panels of the foldable panel combination to stack against each other in a collapsed storage state. 6. The modular greenhouse of claim 1 , wherein one foldable panel or the at least one non-foldable panels is removed from the assembled modular greenhouse to subsequently change one or more architectural details of the assembled modular greenhouse. 7. The modular greenhouse of claim 1, wherein at least one section of the plurality of sections has a cover that is not translucent. 8. The modular greenhouse of claim 1, wherein the at least one non-foldable panel prevents passage of light through the at least one non-foldable panel. 9. The modular greenhouse of claim 1 , wherein the one non-folding panel forms a doorway to which is located either a door or a door plug. 10. The modular greenhouse of claim 1 , wherein several triangular-shaped sections from the first group of sections are hinged together to form a roof dormer panel. 1 1. The modular greenhouse of claim 1 , wherein the roof dormer panel in a collapsed storage state has the four triangular-shaped sections stacked against one another. 12. The modular greenhouse of claim 1 , wherein the assembled modular greenhouse is moved to and joined to a footing constructed at the second site. 13. The modular greenhouse of claim 1 , wherein the modular greenhouse is fabricated in a kit form comprising a box container containing at least the foldable panel pair in a stacked, folded compact state, at least one non-foldable panel, instructions and connecting hardware. 4. A method of assembling a prefabricated modular greenhouse comprising the following steps: (A) providing a prefabricated modular greenhouse, the prefabricated modular greenhouse comprising a plurality of sections, each section constructed from a framework, the framework further creating an open space within the framework that is covered by a cover attaching to the framework; a first group of sections from the plurality of sections forming a plurality of foldable panels, one foldable panel being movably connected to a second foldable panel to form a foldable panel pair that allows the one foldable panel to fold down upon the second foldable panel in a stacked collapsed storage state; and the at least one non-foldable panel and the one foldable panel pair can be removably connected to assemble the modular greenhouse to allow additional non-foldable panels, non-foldable panels or both to be added to the assembled greenhouse to subsequently change one or more architectural details of the assembled greenhouse; (B) unfolding the at least one foldable panel pair; and (C) removably connecting the at least one foldable panel combination and the at least one non-foldable panel in a manner to form an assembled greenhouse. 15. The method of claim 14, further comprises a step of disconnecting and removing from the assemble modular greenhouse at least one foldable panel pair, at least one non-folding panel or both to be replaced with an additional foldable panel, additional non-foldable panel or both having architectural detail not found on the removed foldable panel pair or removed at least one non-folding panel. 16. The method of claim 14, further comprises a step of removably connecting to the assembled 

 1 prefabricated modular greenhouse an additional foldable panel, an additional non-foldable 2 panel or both to the assembled modular greenhouse to increase the footage of the assembled 3 greenhouse as originally assembled. 4 5 17. The method of claim 14, further comprises a step of substituting from the assembled 6 prefabricated modular greenhouse the folding panel pair or the at least one non-foldable panel 7 with an additional foldable panel or additional non-foldable panel to change an architectural 8 detail of the assembled modular greenhouse as originally assembled. 9 10 18. The method of claim 14, further comprises a step of constructing a footing and subsequently ] l positioning the assembled modular greenhouse upon the footing. 12 13 19. The method of claim 18, wherein the step of constructing a footing further comprises a step of 14 securing the assembled greenhouse to a previously constructed footing. 15 16 20. The method of claim 14, wherein the providing prefabricated modular greenhouse further 17 comprises the steps of folding the foldable panel pair; placing the folded foldable panel pair, 18 the at least non-foldable panel, instructions, and connecting hardware into a box container that 19 is subsequently transported to a building site where the prefabricated modular greenhouse is to 20 be assembled.
